hero_subtitle: SFTY connects fragmented KYB checks into one operational workflow that helps VASPs apply internal policies consistently while preserving audit evidence and supporting case review.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Inconsistent KYB rules slow corporate onboarding
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to apply KYB policies consistently when provider outputs and rules remain disconnected. This causes delays, duplicated reviews, and weak audit trails that hamper clear decision-making across corporate onboarding workflows.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY connects fragmented KYB provider outputs, internal rules, case management and audit evidence into one structured workflow to help compliance teams apply consistent policies and accelerate corporate onboarding.
workflow_title: From fragmented KYB checks to approval
workflow_description: SFTY aggregates disparate KYB provider results, applies internal policies, routes cases for review and records decisions with linked evidence for consistent approvals.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented KYB rules. Structured policy control
why_sfty_description: SFTY provides a provider-neutral layer that connects KYB outputs into consistent workflows, decisions, cases and evidence for clearer operational control and audit traceability.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY helps regulated VASPs maintain controlled KYB workflows with connected provider orchestration, audit-grade evidence and enterprise deployment safeguards from onboarding onwards.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY help apply KYB rules consistently for VASPs
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how KYB workflows connect fragmented provider results
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit evidence supports KYB onboarding decisions
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Explain how SFTY manages KYB policy updates and enforcement
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: How does SFTY connect inconsistent KYB rules?
faq_1_answer: SFTY applies internal policies consistently across fragmented KYB provider outputs, connecting corporate onboarding checks into structured, auditable workflows to support coherent rule enforcement for VASPs.
faq_2_question: How are KYB cases and decisions managed?
faq_2_answer: SFTY routes KYB alerts into case workflows with decision logging, reviewer notes and evidence packages, enabling operational teams to track and resolve corporate onboarding reviews efficiently.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve KYB audit evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves onboarding case history, decision logs and supporting evidence to maintain a clear audit trail for KYB compliance and regulatory or banking due diligence.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate existing KYB providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY connects multiple KYB providers’ outputs into one operational layer without disrupting existing systems, supporting role-based access and controlled integration.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace existing KYB providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY sits above KYB providers and orchestration tools, connecting their outputs into structured workflows rather than replacing any existing provider.
final_title: Bring fragmented KYB rules into one workflow
final_description: Explore how SFTY connects corporate onboarding checks, internal policies and cases into consistent, auditable workflows for VASPs.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
footer_contact_title: For supervisory, compliance and deployment discussions.
footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
